description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet with a dark, star-speckled exterior and bold white lettering reading 'SPACE QUEST' on both side panels. The front features a large display screen set into a rectangular frame, showing a simple space-themed game with a moon-like surface and a character facing an alien. The control panel is equipped with two sets of colored joysticks and buttons, suggesting two-player capability, and is decorated with matching star patterns. The cabinet's structure is angular, with a slanted marquee area at the top, though no illuminated marquee artwork is present. The back panel is plain except for a small access panel or label near the bottom. The overall design is reminiscent of retro arcade machines commonly found in arcades, entertainment venues, or urban recreation spaces.
description: A retro upright arcade game cabinet with 'SPACE QUEST' graphics, star-patterned panels, and a two-player control panel. The front features a large screen displaying a space-themed game.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the 'SPACE QUEST' text and starry pattern, with the control panel and joystick silhouettes visible.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the plain star-patterned back panel and a small access panel or label at the bottom.
description_view_2: Right side view mirroring the left, with 'SPACE QUEST' text and starry graphics, and a partial view of the control panel.
description_view_3: Front view highlighting the display screen with a space game, two sets of colored controls, and the star-patterned control panel.
attribute_screen_type: CRT-style display, flat front, medium size, with a visible bezel around the screen
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two-player side-by-side layout with two joysticks (blue and purple) and multiple colored buttons for each player, arranged in clusters
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels feature the 'SPACE QUEST' title in large white letters and a starry pattern of multicolored dots on a black background
